description: A patient with metastatic prostate cancer taking Abiraterone reports that his prescribed Codeine is providing no pain relief. Investigate the interactions between Abiraterone and Codeine, Tramadol, and Morphine using the Liverpool Cancer iChart Archive app. Create a report at /sdcard/abiraterone_pain_audit.txt explaining the metabolic mechanism (such as CYP2D6 or prodrug interactions) causing the Codeine treatment failure, the suitability of Tramadol as an alternative, and the safest opioid recommendation based on your findings.
